buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/90 rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-lg uppercase font-bold tracking-wider transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.outline: border-2 border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-lg uppercase font-bold tracking-wider transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-white hover:text-[#FF3B30] uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-mono

cards.feature: bg-[#111] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-[#FF3B30] transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

logos.placeholder_style: text-2xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter opacity-50 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

content_strategy.tone: Confident, Aggressive, Strategic. 'We don't do what's right. We do what works.'

sections.content: BRIEF DESTROYERS. A CREATIVE SYSTEM IN MOTION.
WE'RE NOT AN AGENCY. WE'RE A SYSTEM.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Anton' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html immediately.
2. THEME: Implement a 'Mixed' theme. Hero is strictly DARK. Philosophy section is STRICTLY LIGHT (White bg, Black text). Process is DARK. This contrast is key.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'Anton' for all H1-H3. It must be HUGE. Use 'Manrope' for body.
4. LAYOUT: Do not use standard centered containers. Use asymmetric grids. Align text left mostly, but use massive centered text for impact statements.
5. INTERACTION: Use framer-motion for everything. Text should slide up. Images should scale on hover.
6. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn for the 'Contact' form or modal, but style it to match the brutalist theme (square corners, thick borders).
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders.

8. LOGOS: Since we don't have real logo SVGs, render the client names (Motorola, Absolut, etc.) in a 'Ticker' or 'Grid' using the 'Anton' font with low opacity (50%) that goes to 100% on hover. This looks intentional and stylish.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors must be solid, no gradients.
Use glassmorphism sparingly, prefer solid contrast.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
